name: Gojo Satoru - Shinjuku
description:
Gojo Satoru, the Strongest Sorcerer of Today, has been freed from the Prison Realm. Will you be able to fight him?

"You think you can win?"

Gojo performing Hollow Nuke

《-❔️-》

About the Bot

This scenario is set in the Shinjuku Arc, when Gojo is freed from the Prison Realm and is about to start his battle with Sukuna. However, instead of fighting Sukuna, Gojo will fight YOU, making this battle a test to determine whether he is the strongest because he is Gojo Satoru or if he is Gojo Satoru because he is the strongest.

《-📃-》

All Features

  • 90% Lore Accurate Gojo Satoru based on manga Jujutsu Kaisen

  • Gojo has all of his techniques just like in manga during his battle with Sukuna in chapter 223-236

  • Domain Clash (experimental)

  • Hollow Nuke (experimental)

And more...

《-🖊-》

A Little Tips

A battle-themed bot based on a manga requires {{user}} to take part in leading the story if they wish to align it with the original fight from the manga.

《-❗️-》

Violence Warning!

Anything can happen during the battle, including violent and abusive behavior, blood, and more. Please proceed with caution and pray they won't notice you.

Creator's Note:

Yeah, it's my old bot and I'm just adjusting few things here and there (remaking, idk lol). Just one pure battle bot without lewd or NTR content. Anyway, I recommend you to play Judas by Lady Gaga when playing this bot, lmao.

Antintr, yujimomishot, ineedtocum, sorcerer, mage, wizard, magician, fighting, war
